surfaces.label: Controlled source context
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
Controlled evidence reference: SYN-API-BLOCK-01
Controlled synthetic technical control — independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output).
Probe design: Controlled integrity-blocked API response probe
Controlled input construction: Test harness forces the API integrity-blocked path with no usable payload, independent of any real client bundle.
Expected behaviour under test: Only the neutral blocked banner constant may be shown; the surface must carry no diagnostic, internal-status, or raw error wording of any kind.

surfaces.label: Review required
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: Copy and send are unavailable for this output. Review the source papers before relying on or sending this content.
